contract_enforcement.policy: Runner normalized invalid model units to the declared empty-output cannot-prove contract. This preserves benchmark honesty while keeping the raw model text in raw-generation-output.json or raw-repair-output.json.

notes: The proof is incomplete; the construction of the bijection is sketched but the antitone condition and positivity proofs are not fully fleshed out. The status is cannot_prove_from_visible_context because the required lemmas about sorting and positivity are not available in the visible context.
